abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Sputtering Exhaust
abilities.text: The area within 2" of this model is concealing terrain. Friendly models may choose to be unaffected by this terrain.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: Brazen Assault
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action was generated by the Charge action, it deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Surgical Strike
triggers.text: Make an Assault marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Ride with Me
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may target another friendly model of lower Sz. Move this model up to 5". Then, if this action targeted another friendly model, place the friendly model into base contact with this model.

actions.name: Resupply
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Draw up to two cards from this model's discard pile with values of 1-5.
